notes: The game starts after adding mfc42 throught Protontricks but is horribly slow. Needs investigation.
title: GT Legends

notes: Install mfc42 through winetricks and disable CSMT through winecfg or regedit to get the game running properly. Both Singleplayer and Multiplayer were tested, controller input and audio work properly as well. Performance seems to be like native.
title: GT Legends

notes: "Insufficient video memory detected. A minimum of 32 MB of free video memory required."
title: GT Legends

notes: I installed mfc42 and the game started. However I had to disable CSMT via winetricks in order to get more FPS than 1 ;)After that the game worked fine.
title: GT Legends

notes:
The game need to install mfc42 with Winetricks/Protontricks. With the previous versions of Proton, the game was unplayable because it worked too slow., but with the last 4.11-2 runs good. There are not Force Feedback Effects with my Logitech G29, but the rest of the wheel functios are allowed. More info:
https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/2728
title: GT Legends

notes: After running "WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/44690/pfx winetricks" and installing mfc42, the game would start. But it would run so slowly, it was unplayable.
